goal: Add a reusable real adapter candidate locator so the remaining M6-RC blocker can be closed deterministically when an operator provides or trains a real CUDA lora_adapter. The locator must scan explicit roots for adapter.safetensors plus adapter_config.json, validate candidates with the existing real adapter intake rules, emit runnable RC gate commands for GO candidates, and report the current environment as having zero GO candidates without claiming release GO. Also repair the M1 smoke bootstrap route-contract sentinel required by the current hook without changing backend, schema, training, export, or release behavior.
head: ff38eeb
blocked_scope: Product runtime, API, DB, schema, training, export implementation, or model behavior changes
UI flow or layout changes beyond the route-contract breadcrumb sentinel repair in apps/desktop/src/main.mjs
Creating or committing model weights or adapter artifacts
Claiming M6-RC or v0 release GO
Weakening real adapter intake, endpoint, or release evidence acceptance
allowed_edit_paths_scope_note: This gate may add adapter candidate locator tooling/tests/evidence, repair the M1 smoke route-contract source sentinel in apps/desktop/src/main.mjs, and update WORKING.md plus this PABCD contract only.
required_evidence: Locator identifies GO real adapter intake candidates and emits RC runner commands
Locator rejects fixture-sized or malformed adapter candidates
Current scan reports zero GO candidates without claiming release GO
M1 smoke bootstrap passes with the route-contract desktop sentinel present
v0 release readiness remains NOT_GO with only real_trained_adapter_no_fake_endpoint as blocker
warnings: M6-RC remains NOT_GO due missing real trained adapter endpoint evidence.
This gate adds locator tooling only and does not generate a trained adapter.
M1 smoke route-contract sentinel repair is limited to apps/desktop/src/main.mjs breadcrumb text.

phase_notes.plan: Open scoped real adapter candidate locator gate after confirming current evidence records manual adapter search but no reusable scan-to-runner automation. Scope was expanded after the hook-required m1-smoke bootstrap failed because apps/desktop/src/main.mjs no longer contained the Route contract sentinel string.
phase_notes.audit: Read current WORKING.md, v0 readiness audit, real adapter intake verifier, M6 RC runner, previous real adapter evidence, bootstrap script, M1 smoke test, and desktop route source. Current adapter evidence had no reusable scan-to-runner automation; the hook-required bootstrap failure was caused by the Route contract sentinel string living only in routeContractView.mjs while the smoke test checks main.mjs source.
phase_notes.build: Added scripts/find_real_adapter_candidates.py, focused tests, current scan JSON/evidence, and restored the apps/desktop/src/main.mjs projectDefine breadcrumb to include Route contract. No backend, schema, training, export, model artifact, endpoint acceptance, or release readiness policy changed.
phase_notes.check: Passed json.tool, py_compile, focused locator pytest, current candidate scan expected zero GO candidates, generated scan JSON validation, v0 release readiness expected NOT_GO, generated readiness JSON validation, hook-required bootstrap_dev.sh m1-smoke --skip-install, git diff --check, and git diff --cached --check.
phase_notes.done: Real adapter candidate locator and M1 smoke sentinel repair are complete. Current scan finds zero GO real-adapter candidates and v0 release readiness remains NOT_GO because real trained CUDA lora_adapter no-fake Docker endpoint evidence is still absent.

pabcd.approved_scope: Real adapter candidate locator script/tests/evidence, apps/desktop/src/main.mjs route-contract sentinel repair, WORKING.md, and PABCD contract only.
pabcd.blocked_scope: No product/runtime/API/backend/schema/training/export behavior changes, no UI flow/layout changes beyond breadcrumb sentinel text, no model artifacts, no release GO claim.
pabcd.phase_completion_git_policy: When verification/evidence commands finish, stage, commit, and push this phase.
